description: Updated noise analysis at commit 10ddabf (2026-04-19). Supersedes noise_report.json. Recomputed over the 22 URIs now returned by run_baseline.

noise_items.origin_in_cv: Analytics Corp, Paris  AND  Université Paris-Saclay
noise_items.why_its_noise: Geographic proper noun (city) collides with ESCO concept 'paris' (FR: wager). No stoplist for city names. UNCHANGED.

noise_items.origin_in_cv: - Methods: Agile, Project management, KPI dashboards, Reporting
noise_items.why_its_noise: 'Project management' = methodology. jsonl alias maps isolated 'management' token to 'gérer une équipe' (people management). Data Analyst / Junior BI Developer roles — no line-management signal in CV. UNCHANGED.

noise_items.origin_in_cv: Power BI dashboards for sales and finance teams
noise_items.why_its_noise: 'sales' denotes the client team the Data Analyst reported TO, not a skill. SKILL_ALIASES['sales']=['argumentaire de vente'] fires without context gate. UNCHANGED.

SKILL_ALIASES['agile'] injects TWO URIs ('gestion de projets par méthode agile' + 'développement par itérations'). CV declares 'Agile' method only — not specifically iterative-development practice. Double-count. UNCHANGED.

NEW at HEAD. SKILL_ALIASES['dashboards'] injects TWO URIs ('logiciel de visualisation des données' + 'techniques de présentation visuelle'). CV says 'KPI dashboards' — a BI-tool output. Injecting 'visual presentation techniques' conflates data viz with generic presentation skills. Second URI is borderline noise (double-count).

noise_items.source_token: data science (bigram, BIGRAM_WHITELIST batch-1 2026-04-18) -> SKILL_ALIASES['data science']
noise_items.why_its_noise: NEW at HEAD. The alias maps 'data science' to 'science des big data'. CV mentions 'Data Science' as the degree name — makes no claim about 'big data' specifically. Abstraction inflation: tooling scale (big data) is asserted from a generic academic label. Borderline noise.

noise_items.origin_in_cv: Data Analyst role + 'Data analysis' bigram + 'Reporting' line
noise_items.why_its_noise: Not noise per se — the candidate IS a Data Analyst. Four surface tokens collapse onto ONE URI with no trace of which specific analysis modality (SQL queries, dashboarding, ML modeling). Dilution. UNCHANGED.

borderline_noise_items: techniques de présentation visuelle (double-count from 'dashboards', NEW at HEAD)
science des big data (abstraction inflate from 'data science', NEW at HEAD)

new_borderline_noise: techniques de présentation visuelle — introduced by batch-1 'dashboards' alias multi-expansion
science des big data — introduced by batch-1 'data science' bigram + alias

root_causes_summary: Alias multi-expansion without selection heuristic: 'agile' and 'dashboards' each inject 2 URIs. No 'most specific' vs 'most general' policy.
Alias abstraction inflation: 'data science' -> 'science des big data' climbs the specificity ladder unjustifiably.
Context-free token triggering: 'sales', 'management', 'paris' fire on surface occurrence regardless of attribution to the candidate.
No proper-noun / geographic guard in ESCO extract or skill_filter.
No counter-alias mechanism to reject inflated expansions once added to raw_tokens.
